The '''Mashi Horansi''', nicknamed the "''Night Stalkers''", were a subspecies of the [[Horansi]] native to [[Mutanda]].

==Biology and appearance==
Mashi stood on average between 1.5 and 2 meters tall. Their fur was jet black and the pelt of a Mashi Horansi was prized by other races. They were a very elusive race and were purely nocturnal.<ref name="PC" />

==Society and culture==
They mated for life and the male raised the young. While able to use technology, they were uncomfortable with it. However, some Mashi moved to [[Justa]] and adapted well to using it.<ref name="PC" />
